notifications.withdrawal_success_msg: Your withdrawal of {{amount}} has been processed successfully.

help.title: Help
help.description: We're here around the clock. Pick a channel, browse common questions, or send us a message — a real human will respond.

dialog.title: Request a Call
dialog.description: Initiate a secure line with a Vault OS agent. Choose your preferred connection path.
dialog.priority_note: Callback requests are cryptographically queued and prioritized by KYC level.
dialog.toast_scheduled: Callback scheduled! A Vault OS agent will call you within 2 minutes.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: How do I reset my Vault PIN securely?
faqs.a1: Go to Settings → Security Center → reset PIN. You'll be asked for biometric verification and a one-time code sent to your authorized device.
faqs.q2: Are there any hidden fees for P2P transfers?
faqs.a2: No. Vault OS is a zero-hidden-fee platform. The only fee shown at checkout is the network/exchange fee, which is itemized before you confirm.
faqs.q3: Why is my withdrawal to a bank delayed?
faqs.a3: Bank withdrawals are subject to your destination bank's processing window — typically 1–3 business days. Verify your KYC level for higher daily limits.
faqs.q4: How can I view my session history and logs?
faqs.a4: Open Settings → Security Center → Session History. You'll see every login, device, and action in chronological order.
faqs.a5: Level 2 unlocks large withdrawals, international transfers, and higher peer-transfer limits. Verify your government ID under Account Profile.

form.title: Direct Contact Form
form.message_placeholder: Describe your issue in detail. The more context you share, the faster we can help.
form.agree: I agree to Vault's Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy.
form.toast_success: Your message has been sent. We’ll get back to you soon.
form.toast_error: Please fill in all required fields before submitting the message.
form.toast_agree_error: You must agree to the terms before submitting.

help.footer_note: Need urgent help? Call our 24/7 line at

ai_insights.title: AI Financial Insight
ai_insights.placeholder: Click generate to analyze your spending and get AI predictions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configuration
settings.description: Manage your profile, security posture, and personal preferences. Changes apply across all authorized devices.

picture.label: Profile Picture
picture.description: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account

dialog.title: Update Profile Photo
dialog.description: Choose how you'd like to update your avatar.

business.hint: Enable to receive public payments via QR
business.enable_desc: Activate your public payment profile and generate your unique Vault QR code for instant B2C settlements.
business.name: Business Name
business.name_desc: The name customers will see on their receipts.
business.description_desc: Summarize your offerings for your public portal.

how_it_works.title: How Merchant Mode Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Set your business identity. This is what customers see when they scan your code or visit your link.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Download your QR code for physical display or share your unique payment URL across digital platforms.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Customers pay via Vault or M-Pesa. Each transaction is cryptographically verified for maximum security.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Funds are settled instantly in your Vault. No 2-3 day waiting periods or high merchant fees.

business.inactive_desc: Enable Merchant Mode to start accepting public payments and unlock business growth tools.

biometric.label: Face ID / Biometric Login
biometric.description: Use device biometrics to unlock the vault.

devices.label: Authorized Devices
devices.management_desc: Review and manage all devices currently authorized to access your Vault OS account.
devices.revoke_note: Revoking a device will immediately sign it out and require a new secure PIN verification to re-authorize.

pin.dialog_desc: Update your 6-digit access code. You will need your current PIN to authorize this change.

security.session_history_desc: A comprehensive record of all security-related actions and session activity.
security.audit_note: Vault OS audit logs are cryptographically sealed and immutable once recorded.

preferences.ai_insights_desc: Receive proactive financial health alerts and advice.

danger.delete_desc: Permanently delete your Vault OS account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone and will immediately revoke access to all authorized devices.
danger.irreversible_title: This is an irreversible action. Please ensure you have downloaded or backed up any important data before proceeding.
danger.confirm_desc: This is a significant action. You are about to initiate the permanent removal of your Vault OS identity.
danger.confirm_purge: All your financial history, ledger entries, and personal data will be permanently purged.
danger.final_desc: This action is **irreversible**. Once completed, your funds and account access cannot be recovered by Vault Support.
final_list: Immediate revocation of all device sessions
Permanent deletion of all cryptographic keys
Removal of your unique KYC tag and profile
danger.verify_desc: To prevent accidental deletion, please type {{target}} below and provide your password.

assets.title: Active Assets Found
assets.desc: Before deleting your account, you must ensure you have no remaining balance, active loans, or pending savings goals.

danger.email_sent_desc: A security verification email has been sent to {{email}}. Please click the link in the email to start the 4-day grace period.
